race.comment: IRISH JIG (2) fourth-up for this and ready to peak in this easier contest. Was in the firing line on the turn with a courageous second over 1200m at Tamworth. Nicely placed to fill a top-three spot again. PATTERA (9) was a month between runs when he shouldered the big weight to get the job done over 1065m at Wagga Riverside five weeks ago. Has a good record at this trip and can play a major role with map favours. CHEAP SHOT (7) bounced back to winning form with a smart heavy track win at Bathurst last start and rates a chance in this field. QUICK SHARP (5) has yet to hit her straps in two runs this time in work, the latest effort an eighth over 1200m at Tamworth. Likely improver.
